title: Abhishek Sharma Blasts 74 as SRH Power to 219/6 Against Punjab Kings
description: Sunrisers Hyderabad posted a commanding 219/6 in 20 overs, driven by Abhishek Sharma’s 74 off 28 balls and key contributions from Travis Head, Ishan Kishan, and Heinrich Klaasen, while Punjab Kings fought back with wickets but struggled to contain the scoring rate.
